(.)/2009-10/3i1 1'IT V (t.)/2011/13u 3f'ITlRUI, 'fJJ III, —4, UT'It1 8 I'1, 2011 NT r'rfj f'lT 1TZIT P411 Fair Competition For Greater Good COMPETITION COMMISSION OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th, October, 2013 The Competition Commission of India (General) Amendment Regulations, 2013 (No.2 of 2013) No. L-3 (2)fRegIn.-Gen. (Amdt.)/2013/CCI.—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 64 of the Competition Act, 2002 (12 of 2003), the Competition Commission of India hereby makes the following amendments in the Competition Commission of India (General) Regulations, 2009, namely:--- 1. (1) These regulations may be called the Competition Commission of India (General) Amendment Regulations, 2013. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Competition Commission of India (General) Regulations, 2009, regulation 4 (Seal & Emblem) shall stand amended as under:- "The official seal and emblem (with tagline) of the Commission shall be such as indicated by a drawing in Annexure." I SMITA JHINGRAN, Secy. [ADVT. IIl/4/Exty./l 87-Mj -- 2 of 4 -- [1pT III—mss 4] TRci T TPI I~R~T 3 Note :—The Competition Commission of India (General) Regulations, 2009 were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III Section 4, dated 22nd May, 2009. Subsequently amended by notification No. L-3(2)/ Regln.-Gen. (Arndt.) 2009-10/CCI published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II1, Section 4, dated August 20, 2009, No. L-3(2) Regln.- Gen.
